active_tabs_alerts_help.message: Tabs that triggered a page monitor alert. Dismiss individual alerts or clear all.

active_tabs_refreshing_help.message: Tabs currently auto-refreshing. Hover a tab to pause, restart, or stop.

add_email_tooltip.message: Add an email address to receive alerts

alert_when_any_change_detected.message: Auto Refresh Plus will alert you whenever any change is detected on this webpage

alert_when_keyword_appears.message: Get notified when your keyword appears.

alert_when_keyword_disappears.message: Get notified when your keyword disappears.

app_description.message: Refresh the page automatically with powerful page monitor features.

are_you_sure.message: Are you sure you want to delete?

auto_click_help.message: Automatically clicks the link if the monitored keyword contains a link.

auto_click_targets_desc.message: Click elements after each refresh or when keyword matches

auto_disable_on_first_desc.message: Disable this schedule after it runs once

auto_tasks_help.message: Automatically clicks selected elements on the page.

auto_tasks_open_in_new_tab.message: Open in new tab if link

clear_all_keywords_desc.message: Are you sure you want to clear all keywords?

continue_refreshing_help.message: Trigger alert on keyword detection but continue refreshing as usual.

continue_refreshing_switch_desc.message: Keep refreshing once an alert fires

countdown_timer_modes_help.message: Choose how the timer fires: Duration counts down from a set hours/minutes/seconds value; Date & Time fires once at an exact moment you pick.

countdown_triggers_once.message: triggers once at the selected moment

custom_expression_desc.message: It is initialized with two ## symbols, and they are Boolean statements for OR and AND operators. It must be enclosed in parentheses (4 parentheses in total).

custom_expression_example_1_desc.message: Searches for "in stock" OR "available" AND "add to cart" OR "buy now"

custom_expression_example_3_desc.message: Boolean expression using OR (|) and AND operators with parentheses

custom_interval_desc.message: Set exact hours, minutes, and seconds

date_time_desc.message: Set countdown to trigger at a specific date and time.

default_help_description.message: You can also configure '%1' in General Settings to apply it across all websites.

detect_any_change.message: Auto Refresh Plus has detected a change on this website.

developer_mode_msg.message:
For security and stability reasons, developer mode is not permitted.
Please download and install the extension from the official store to ensure you have latest and most secure version

duration_desc.message: Set countdown using hours, minutes, and seconds.

duration_help.message: Use this action to set a countdown based on a specific duration in hours, minutes, and seconds

email_alert_help.message: Email alerts notify you when specific changes or events occur. Add an email address to start receiving these notifications

email_alerts_switch_desc.message: Email you when the monitor triggers

email_limit_toast_description.message: You have reached your daily email limit. Upgrade to continue sending email alerts.

enable_captcha_detection_help.message: Enable to detect when a captcha challenge appears.

enable_error_detection_help.message: Enable to detect failed or broken pages.

enter_custom_interval.message: Enter your custom interval in seconds.

error_save_preferences.message: Failed to save preferences. Please try again.

error_schedule_one_day.message: You must select at least one day.

error_stop_time.message: Stop time must be later than the start time.

ext_changes_merged.message: Changes that will be merged into local options.

ext_custom_script_add_only.message: This operation only adds a new script and never silently overwrites existing scripts.

ext_error_storage.message: Failed to read pending review from extension storage.

ext_error_sync.message: Failed to %1 request due to storage sync error.

ext_no_pending_description.message: There are no pending changes to review. This page will appear when an external source requests a configuration update.

ext_review_description.message: Review the proposed changes and approve only if they match your intent. Nothing is applied until you confirm.

feature_is_premium.message: %1 is a premium feature. Upgrade to access all premium tools and enhance your experience.

follow_all_redirects_desc.message: Continue refreshing even if the page redirects to a different URL.

frozen_tab_noti_message.message: Your browser froze this tab in the background to save memory. Auto-refresh will resume when you switch back to it.

full_page_type_desc.message: Reload the entire page to check for changes

full_page_type_help.message: Normal refresh allows you to check for changes in the entire page, including all content and resources.

grace_period_banner.message: Your grace period expires on July 1. Premium features will be disabled

grace_period_consent_body.message: You're about to lose access to Premium features. Are you sure you want to continue with the Free plan?

grace_period_expired_data_safe.message: Your settings and data are safe and will remain saved.

grace_period_expired_description.message: Premium features are no longer active on your account.

grace_period_expired_upgrade_hint.message: You can upgrade anytime to restore all Premium features.

hard_refresh_help.message: Reload the page without relying on cached data.

highlight_keyword_help.message: When a keyword is detected, it will be visually highlighted on the page.

interaction_help.message: Automatically stop refreshing when the user interacts with the page.

interactions_switch_desc.message: What happens when you use the page

interval_modes_help.message: Fixed: refresh every N seconds. Random: vary the interval within a range. Custom: set a precise hours/minutes/seconds duration.

keyword_input_placeholder.message: Enter keyword, regex, XPath, or CSS selector (separate multiple with commas)...

match_html_source_desc.message: Scan raw source — slower, use with caution

monitor_area_selector_desc.message: Enter a CSS selector or pick an element on the page.

monitor_area_switch_desc.message: Limit the search to one region

monitor_custom_area.message: Search in Custom Area of the Page

monitor_custom_area_help.message: Enable to specify a custom area of the page for monitoring or search.

monitor_full_page_help.message: Enable to monitor changes across the entire webpage.

monitoring_engine_tooltip_desc.message: Works across all selections — Found, Lost & Custom — with faster, smarter detection.

monitoring_keywords_empty.message: No keywords yet — add at least one to start monitoring.

monitoring_mode_custom_info_suffix.message: is detected on this page — no keywords required.

monitoring_mode_found_desc.message: Get notified when your keyword appears.

monitoring_mode_help.message: Choose when Auto Refresh Plus should alert you

monitoring_mode_lost_desc.message: Get notified when your keyword disappears.

monitoring_tip_banner.message: Need more actions? Try Multi-Click Automation.

no_active_tabs_desc.message: There are currently no tabs being monitored or refreshed. Start refreshing a tab to see it here.

no_keyword.message: No keywords added yet. Add keywords to monitor.

no_templates_match.message: No templates match your search criteria.

normal_expression_desc.message: It searches for keywords on the web page and does not need to be initialized with any symbol. Just press enter on each keyword.

normal_expression_example_1_desc.message: Searches for the exact text "In Stock" on the web page

normal_expression_example_2_desc.message: Searches for multiple keywords, press enter after each keyword

normal_expression_example_3_desc.message: Searches for "Add to Cart" button or text on the page

not_allowed.message: You are not allowed to use it here.

noti_msg.message: Auto Refresh Plus has %1 your target text.

open_link_help.message: Opens the clicked link in a new browser tab.

permissions_btn_grant.message: Grant site access for dashboard hosts

permissions_config_missing_body.message: is not defined in the build environment. Rebuild with it set to your dashboard hostname.

permissions_error_denied.message: Permissions were denied. Grant access for the dashboard host so syncing and injected features work reliably.

permissions_error_dialog.message: Something went wrong while opening the permission dialog. Try again or check your browser settings.

permissions_error_read_state.message: Could not read site permission state. Reload this page or try again later.

permissions_granted_body.message: This extension already has matching host permission for your platform. You may close this tab.

permissions_intro_dashboard.message: Control whether the extension can run on your Auto Refresh Plus dashboard domains (content scripts and platform integration).

permissions_revoke_hint.message: To revoke later, remove this site from the extensions site access list in your browser settings.

permissions_warn_body_prefix.message: Grant access so the extension can inject into your dashboard, mirror preferences, and keep the dashboard experience in sync with the extension (same host pattern as the content script:

permissions_warn_title.message: Site access is not granted yet

play_alarm_on_captcha_detection_help.message: Play sound alert when captcha is detected.

play_alarm_on_error_detection_help.message: Play sound alert when an error page is detected.

predefined_interval_desc.message: Use preset or default time values

premium_usage_body.message: Premium features active on free plan.

pro_announcement_body.message: Auto Refresh Plus is gradually introducing PRO to support long-term development, advanced features, cloud sync, smarter monitoring, and multi-device management, while keeping core refresh features free for all users.

pro_announcement_fresh_install_body.message: Unlock %1 and the full premium experience with PRO, including advanced tools, smarter monitoring, cloud sync, and multi-device access.

random_interval_help.message: With current settings, the page will refresh randomly every %1 to %2 seconds.

ready_expressions_load_error.message: Unable to load the templates. Please try again later.

realtime_help.message: Detect changes continuously during refresh, not just at the end of the interval.

redirection_behavior_help.message: Choose how Auto Refresh Plus handles URL changes. You can lock to the original domain or follow redirections.

refresh_number_help.message: Set how many times you want to refresh the page.

refresh_position_hint_body.message: You can change the refresh button and other UI cosmetics from this menu.

refresh_type_help.message: How the page is reloaded before each scan. Full Page reloads the entire URL like pressing refresh — reliable but heavier. XHR fires only the page's background AJAX/XHR requests (no full reload) — faster and lighter, ideal for dynamic pages that update content without reloading.

regex_expression_desc.message: Auto Refresh Plus also supports Regex expressions and must initialize with the $ symbol and followed by the regex expression.

regex_expression_example_1_desc.message: Matches "product" followed by one or more digits (product1, product42, etc.)

regex_expression_example_2_desc.message: Matches "in stock" case insensitive using regex flags

restart_wait_seconds_desc.message: Set the number of seconds to wait before the refresh starts again

sch_description.message: Run automatically at chosen times on selected days.

schedule_help.message: Schedules let you auto-refresh at specific times and days. Each schedule can have a start time, selected weekdays, auto-stop, and auto-disable options.

select_area_desc.message: Enter a CSS selector to limit the search area

select_css_selector.message: Select an element to set the area selector

session_expired.message: Your session has expired. Please login again.

signup_requirement_body.message: An account will soon be required to continue.

skip_repeated_keyword_help.message: Ignore already detected keywords in the next refresh.

slave_device_alert_body.message: This extension is configured as a slave device. Settings and refresh control may mirror your primary device.

slave_message_alert.message: You cannot modify this option because you are a slave user.

source_find_text_caution.message: This option is intended mainly for developers. Scanning the raw HTML source can match hidden or non-visible markup, which often leads to false positives. It is slower and not recommended for everyday monitoring — enable it only when visible-text matching isn't enough.

source_find_text_help.message: Extracts text directly from the HTML source code. May include hidden or dynamic content.

syntax_css_desc.message: Target elements with standard CSS selectors — by id, class, attribute, or hierarchy.

syntax_css_ex3_desc.message: Selects the element where data-testid is "add-to-cart"

syntax_custom_desc.message: Initialized with ## and combine multiple keywords using Boolean AND / OR / NOT logic.

syntax_custom_ex1_desc.message: Triggers only when both "In Stock" and "Add to Cart" appear

syntax_custom_ex2_desc.message: Triggers when any one of the keywords appears

syntax_custom_ex3_desc.message: Triggers when "In Stock" appears but "Sold Out" does not

syntax_norm_ex1_desc.message: Matches the exact text "In Stock" anywhere on the page

syntax_norm_ex2_desc.message: Match multiple keywords — press enter after each one

syntax_norm_ex3_desc.message: Matches the "Add to Cart" button or text on the page

syntax_regex_desc.message: Wrapped in forward slashes /.../ to match text patterns. Useful for prices, SKUs, and flexible matches.

syntax_regex_ex1_desc.message: Matches a dollar amount such as $19.99 or $1,299.00

syntax_regex_ex3_desc.message: Matches a product SKU like SKU-12345

syntax_text_matching_desc.message: Searches for plain keywords on the web page. No symbol needed — just press enter after each keyword.

syntax_xpath_desc.message: Begin with // to target elements by their position in the page's HTML structure.

syntax_xpath_ex1_desc.message: Selects any element with the class "price"

syntax_xpath_ex2_desc.message: Selects a button whose text is "Add to Cart"

template_add_to_cart_button_desc.message: Match the cart button by test id

template_any_stock_term_desc.message: Trigger on any one stock keyword

template_in_stock_buyable_desc.message: Alert only when stocked AND purchasable

template_in_stock_not_sold_out_desc.message: In stock while excluding sold-out text

template_restock_alert_desc.message: Catch the moment an item is back

template_stock_and_price_desc.message: Items in stock AND on sale

template_stock_status_element_desc.message: Target an element by its class

this_is_not_valid_css_selector.message: This is not a valid CSS selector.

user_menu_refresh_position_tooltip.message: Show refresh buttons in the header

visual_find_text_help.message: Extracts visible text from the screen as a human would see it.

visual_timer_desc.message: Overlay a countdown on the page

visual_timer_help.message: The visual timer displays a countdown directly on the webpage. It shows the remaining time until the next refresh and includes controls to pause, resume, or reset the timer.

wait_content_load_desc.message: Delay the scan after each refresh

wait_content_load_help.message: Wait before detection to allow the content to fully load.

warning_random_interval.message: Maximum value must be greater than minimum value for random intervals to work properly.

webhook_alert_help.message: Webhooks allow you to send alerts to other applications or services when changes are detected.

webhook_alerts_switch_desc.message: POST a payload to your endpoint

webhooks_tooltip.message: Open webhook settings to receive alerts

whats_new_load_error.message: Unable to load the release notes. Please try again later.

whats_new_thank_you.message: Thank you for using Auto Refresh Plus

window_focus_on_detection_desc.message: Bring the tab forward when matched

window_focus_on_detection_help.message: Enable window focus when Page Monitor finds or loses a keyword. This feature ensures that the window automatically comes to the forefront of your screen whenever the specified keyword is detected or lost.

xhr_page_help.message: Retrieve data from a URL without having to do a full page refresh. This enables a web page to update just part of a page without disrupting what the user is doing.

xhr_request_autoclick_desc.message: Click the page element you want to auto-click.

xpath_expression_desc.message: The XML Paths Language provides a flexible way of addressing the different parts of a document. It must be initialized with two @@ symbols.

xpath_expression_example_1_desc.message: Searches for any element containing the text "In Stock"

xpath_expression_example_2_desc.message: Searches for input elements with value attribute containing "Search"

xpath_expression_example_3_desc.message: Searches for div elements with class "price" containing "$" symbol

your_expressions_define_placeholder.message: Define expression (e.g. In Stock or ##In Stock AND Add to Cart)

your_expressions_empty.message: No saved expressions yet. Tap "Add new" to create one.
